prestazioni: 4B11T (2.0L MIVEC Turbo) engine upgraded with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) paired with a Tomei 272°/272° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Tomei Type-S valve springs to handle 10,000+ RPM safely. Fuel system includes ID1000x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to mitigate oil buildup in the intake tract.

Full titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L (70mm diameter, 1.2mm wall thickness) with a custom 4-2-1 equal-length header (304 stainless steel, 1.5mm primary tubes) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 32psi mapping on E85. Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for 500+ ft-lbs torque capacity.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm diameter, 3-point design) and a full Whiteline alignment kit (2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear camber, 0.1° front toe-out). Rear subframe reinforced with a Cusco 4-point brace and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 80-1200-01K).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with custom canards by Varis Japan (100mm extended, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment). Front bumper lip replaced with a Seibon Carbon fiber GT-Wing replica (200mm chord, 30° angle) and a custom aluminum undertray for -15% lift coefficient.

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm height, 3D-printed aluminum endplates) with Gurney flaps (15mm) and a custom carbon fiber diffuser by APR Performance (3-stage design, 400mm width). Side skirts replaced with C-West JDM-spec units (20mm lower than OEM, pre-drilled for tow hooks).

Enkei RS05RR wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x11 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit (380mm rotors, 2-piece floating design) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines. Full carbon fiber hood by Seibon (50% weight reduction, functional vents for turbo heat extraction).
